overview: Dr. Ashwin Singh Chouhan's professional portfolio website for a pharmacologist and researcher. Features animated 3D sections for Research, Articles, Publications, and Notes with PDF upload/download capabilities. Admin dashboard for content management with drag-and-drop PDF uploads.
features: Dynamic PDF upload and download system
Drag-and-drop PDF upload in admin dashboard
View and Download PDF buttons on public pages
Admin CRUD for Research, Articles, Publications, Notes
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
